description: Buyer asks for foot traffic data for Target's top stores; one seller has the right dataset, two sellers have distractors (satellite parking proxy, brand sentiment). Happy-path baseline.

buyer_context.task: I'm evaluating quarterly performance of Target and need foot traffic data for their top 50 US stores for Q1 2026. Weekly granularity or finer is required.
constraints: must be weekly granularity or finer
must be attributable to specific Target stores

rubric.criterion: Final output contains the key terms (Target, foot traffic, weekly)
Agent's reasoning correctly justifies why competing sellers were rejected (satellite parking, brand sentiment)
Final output is useful and actionable — specific recommendation with pricing and fit analysis

notes: Baseline happy-path scenario. If this fails, nothing else will work.
